name: Fish Snack Cat Plush Toy - Boots & Barkley™
description:
Surprise your foodie pet with the Fish Snack Cat Plush Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This crinkle cat toy showcases a fish snack topped with tomato plus catnip inside to keep them extra excited. Made of polyester fabric, this plush cat toy is great for keeping them busy kicking, pouncing and chasing.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.
